center.name: 加拿大北部
center.summary: 加拿大北部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括小加拿大雁、Purple finch、树雀鹀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Birds from northern Canada migrate to the southern United States; other birds are permanent residents. The purple finch population has been displaced from some breeding season habitats in the Eastern United States following the introduction of the house finch, which is native to the western U.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This species is native to North America, breeding in Northern Canada and Alaska in a variety of tundra habitats, where the nest is usually located in an elevated area near water

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in Alaska and Northern Canada and winters in Southern Canada and the Contiguous United States
